data_maps_VerdanturfTown_ContestHall_tex.VerdanturfTown_ContestHall_Text_177FB4:
Which CONTEST are you entering?
Want a piece of advice?\pIn any CONTEST, for example, a CUTE
CONTEST, I don't think they judge you\lonly on cuteness in the first round.\pYou need to work out ways for raising
POKéMON better.
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_ContestHall_tex.VerdanturfTown_ContestHall_Text_178091: I raised my POKéMON to be cute.\pI found out you can put POKéMON in\na CONTEST for cuteness!\pI'm so glad I raised my POKéMON with\nloving care...
data_maps_VerdanturfTown_ContestHall_tex.VerdanturfTown_ContestHall_Text_178120: My POKéMON rules!\pIt's cool, tough yet beautiful, cute,\nand smart. It's complete!\pI may as well go for wins in every\nsingle CONTEST.
